pathingCostAnalysis.rule: Every square costs 2 squares of movement (10 feet per square).

agentLogic.condition: Target is on the other side of difficult terrain
agentLogic.evaluation: Calculate if (StrideDistance / 2) >= DistanceToTarget. If False, do NOT Stride twice. Instead, use a Ranged Attack, Ready an action, or force the enemy to cross it.
agentLogic.exception: Agent possesses Feats/Abilities that ignore difficult terrain (e.g., Woodland Stride, Nimble Elf).

pathingCostAnalysis.terrainType: Hazardous Terrain / Acid Pools / Wall of Fire
pathingCostAnalysis.rule: Entering or ending a turn in the square inflicts immediate static/persistent damage.

agentLogic.action: Recalculate route. Absolute veto on crossing unless (TotalDamageIntersections < AgentRemainingHP) AND (DestinationResult == Immediate Enemy Kill).
agentLogic.forcedMovementMitigation: If an enemy has Shove/Reposition abilities, maximize distance from hazardous edges.

threatZoneEvaluation.condition: Two or more enemies are positioned on directly opposite sides/corners of the agent, making the agent Off-Guard (-2 AC).
threatZoneEvaluation.priority: CRITICAL OVERRIDE. Activating this flag supersedes any offensive actions.

mitigationOptions.condition: Adjacent square is safe and empty
mitigationOptions.reasoning: Breaks the flanking line instantly without triggering Reactive Strikes. Restores +2 AC immediately.

mitigationOptions.condition: Completely surrounded or blocked by enemies/walls
mitigationOptions.reasoning: Allows the agent to move directly through an enemy's square to escape the pincer formation.

threatZoneEvaluation.condition: Agent is ending its turn in melee range of multiple mobile enemies.

preventativeActions.description: Stride/Step so the agent's back or side is flush against solid, impassable geometry.
preventativeActions.reasoning: Mathematically prevents enemies from positioning themselves on directly opposite sides, making it physically impossible for them to establish a flank.

bottleneckLogic.condition: Battlefield features a 5-to-10 foot wide doorway, hallway, or bridge

Tank_Champion_Fighter.description: Stand exactly in the bottleneck center. Use Raise a Shield or Take Cover.
Tank_Champion_Fighter.reasoning: Maximizes defensive status while body-blocking enemy progression. Forces enemies to target high-AC assets.

Squishy_Caster_Ranged.description: Maintain a minimum distance of 20 feet behind the frontliner blocking the chokepoint.
Squishy_Caster_Ranged.reasoning: Creates absolute safety from melee rushers and forces enemies into high-density clusters perfect for AoE (Area of Effect) reflex spells like Fireball.
